completed: Added a pull-request template with a required Procedure compliance section
Added a GitHub Actions workflow that checks PR bodies for the compliance audit trail
Updated the autonomous loop and research manager instructions to require PR-body procedure compliance
Extended the structured update schema and validator to accept procedure-compliance metadata
why_it_matters: The autonomous researcher now has a visible PR-body audit trail, making skipped orientation, missing registry review, unreported decision gates, and confidentiality checks easier to catch during review.

checks_run.name: make validate-update
checks_run.notes: Not run in this GitHub connector environment; the updated validator and example are committed for CI/local validation.

checks_run.name: PR procedure compliance workflow
checks_run.notes: Workflow will execute when this pull request is opened or edited.

decision_needed.default_if_no_response: Use the PR-body Procedure compliance section as the default audit trail for autonomous-researcher pull requests.

procedure_compliance.notes: This PR changes governance infrastructure only; no scientific claims, theorem assumptions, RAID data, or participant-level outputs were added.

risks_or_uncertainties: The PR-body workflow checks that the audit section exists and contains required items; it cannot verify truthfulness of the checklist responses.
Older open PRs may need their bodies edited to satisfy the new template after this change is merged.
next_bounded_task: After this is merged, update any open autonomous-researcher PR bodies to include the new Procedure compliance section.
